name: Sievo Procurement Analytics Platform API
what_it_does: Procurement analytics and spend intelligence platform with REST API — enabling procurement teams to analyze spending patterns across ERP systems, classify spend by category, measure cost avoidance and savings, track supplier performance, and generate procurement KPIs with AI-powered anomaly detection and forecasting for total cost optimization.
use_cases: Extracting spend analytics and procurement KPIs via Sievo API for executive dashboards
Integrating Sievo classified spend data with other procurement tools via API
Querying supplier performance metrics and risk signals via Sievo API for sourcing decisions
Syncing Sievo cost savings tracking with financial reporting systems via API
Pulling procurement anomaly alerts and AI-generated insights via Sievo API for proactive management
not_for: Purchase order creation and approval (Sievo is analytics, not transactional procurement)
Supplier negotiation and RFx (use Keelvar or Fairmarkit for sourcing events)
Small businesses (Sievo targets enterprise with complex multi-ERP data environments)
best_when: A large enterprise procurement team needs to aggregate and analyze spend data from multiple ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, Microsoft) to get a unified view of spending patterns, supplier concentration, and savings opportunities across the organization.
avoid_when: You have a single ERP system, simple procurement needs, or primarily need transactional procurement tools rather than analytics.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for system integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with analytics module access. No webhooks — synchronous analytics query model. REST API for procurement analytics data access. Data ingestion via ERP connectors (SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics) — separate configuration from API. SAML SSO for enterprise identity.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing; contact sales; typically $100K-500K/year based on spend under management
pricing.notes: Finnish company (Helsinki). Founded 2003. Raised €15M Series B (2021). Backed by Verdane (Nordic PE). One of Europe's leading procurement analytics specialists. Strong Nordic and European enterprise market. SAP S/4HANA and SAP ECC certified connectors. Used by Fortum, Neste, Konecranes, Wärtsilä. Spend classification AI trained on €1T+ in procurement data. Used primarily for strategic procurement decision support, not transactional operations. Nordic engineering culture with high data quality standards.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for procurement analytics data access. OAuth2 client credentials auth. Enterprise documentation with ERP integration guides. No webhooks — polling for analytics updates. Analytics queries are asynchronous for large datasets. Finnish company with GDPR-first design. Data ingestion via ERP connectors requires separate configuration before API is useful.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Analytics queries fully idempotent — same period/filters yield same results. Spend data reads idempotent. Supplier performance reads idempotent. KPI calculations idempotent by time period.
known_agent_gotchas: ERP data ingestion must be configured before analytics API has data to return
Large analytics queries are asynchronous — may take minutes to process
Annual contract required — significant investment for procurement analytics platform
Data classification quality depends on spend categorization setup — requires procurement expertise
Finnish company with EU data residency — strong GDPR compliance but verify for non-EU data

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, SOC2, ISO27001 compliant. EU and Finnish data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Finnish company with privacy-first engineering. Spend data is commercially sensitive — pricing, supplier terms, and cost structure must be protected. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. ERP data integration requires secure connector configuration. Analytics data retention per GDPR requirements.
